message:
🐛 Fix demo/live data leaking across mode boundaries (#771)

- Add `demoData` parameter to `useCache` to separate demo display data
  from initial loading state. Previously `initialData` served both roles,
  causing demo data to appear in live mode when fetchers failed.
- Update all 11 cached hooks: `initialData: []`, `demoData: getDemoXxx()`
- Remove 5 fetcher fallbacks that returned demo data on failure
- Add demo mode awareness to ClusterGroups card (shows demo groups)
- Add demo mode awareness to Missions card (shows demo missions)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   icon: typeof Rocket
   color: string
@@ -106,8 +140,12 @@ const SORT_OPTIONS: { value: SortByOption; label: string }[] = [

+  const completedMissions = demoMode ? DEMO_MISSIONS : liveCompleted
   const [expandedMissions, setExpandedMissions] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set())
   const [hideCompleted, setHideCompleted] = useState(false)
